description: PitchSignal version — P0 quarantine v3 (Owner A: Coach/capacity-Venue/Fatigue/KO-λ-shrink removed; P0 public probability = Elo+Poisson ONLY, odds/MarketValue/Continental are candidate-only and cannot change it; World Cup neutral venue FAIL-CLOSED by schedule membership (venue-parse failure stays neutral); env β shadow-only; regulation/advance split with advance unavailable=null; confidence renamed to heuristicUncertainty/heuristicConfidence and marked unvalidated; full modelContract+configHash)
